title: Why hire me
headline: Why teams trust me with ambitious AI and software work
searchDescription: I connect research, real-world systems, and product delivery without losing sight of usefulness.
aiDescription: I build AI systems that connect research, product, and real-world impact - from large language models to agentic and multimodal systems.

At Virginia Tech, I conduct research with a Google DeepMind faculty researcher, contributing to SealQA (ICLR), where I built scalable evaluation pipelines for long-context LLMs using GPU inference, retrieval, and structured reasoning.

At Marriott International, I shipped AI-powered tools for the Bonvoy app (237M+ users), including a translation system and a computer vision-driven testing assistant that improved development speed and reliability.

Beyond internships, I've built systems across very different domains - from multi-agent AI copilots and RAG applications to creator analytics pipelines powering a 400K+ audience, and real-time sensor systems for autonomous vehicle tracking.
I'm especially interested in building intelligent systems that don't just work in demos, but operate reliably under real-world constraints - at scale, with real users.
